{{Infobox group
| name = Grandmasters
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Grandmasters Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Grandmasters are a group of high-ranking leaders who represent various [[Territories]], each identified by specific symbols on their banners. These individuals hold significant titles and reputations, such as [[Helgard]], who is recognized as a highly skilled traveler. The members of the Grandmasters' [[Council]] vary in appearance, ranging from athletic men and older women to androgynous figures. They are associated with different regions, including [[Enosh]] and [[Naraka]], and utilize distinct uniforms or clothing to denote their status. While some Grandmasters are viewed as protectors, others have been accused of committing grave crimes, such as endangering the world by attempting to release the [[Incarnations]]. The group is subject to internal politics and external scrutiny, with some members facing imprisonment or death due to their actions.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|During a recent meeting, the Grandmasters engaged in discussions regarding [[Incarnations]] and formulated plans for an upcoming attack. Driven by the belief that [[Damasca]] is a tyrant who is killing the world, this group of secrecy-valuing leaders negotiated alliance details involving the [[Overlord]] and his [[Travelers]]. Despite their strategic planning, the Grandmasters face dwindling numbers that prevent them from engaging in a long war. Their journey eventually led them to reach the [[Tree]] in [[Cana]], though [[Alin]] maintains the view that the Grandmasters themselves are part of the problem.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Grandmasters]] are meeting today.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmasters]] have discussed [[Incarnations]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Grandmasters]] are planning to attack.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Grandmasters]] believe [[Damasca]] is killing the world and driving people with tyranny.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmasters]] prize secrecy.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Grandmasters]] discussed alliance details with the [[Overlord]] and his [[Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Grandmasters]] have dwindling numbers and cannot fight a long war.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] believes the [[Grandmasters]] are part of the problem.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Grandmasters]] reached the [[Tree]] in [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmasters]] assign inner and outer guards.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"The Grandmasters were talking about them—"<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
